name: offline-youtube-mirror
description: Download a YouTube channel and self-host it for offline LAN/WAN viewing.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @oym/shared && npm run build --workspace @oym/web && npm run build --workspace @oym/server
scripts.download: npm run build --workspace @oym/shared && npm run start --workspace @oym/downloader --
scripts.server: npm run build --workspace @oym/shared && npm run start --workspace @oym/server
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @oym/shared && npm run dev --workspace @oym/server
